text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly put together some documents due
today, and am running to deliver them, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A strong gust of wind blows them away! My spirits
start to sink, when...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...Whoopsie. These your papers?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Thanks for picking them up for m—
Yeah! Thanks for picking them up for m—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Now, what shall I do with these?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I was the one who picked them up, so it's up to
me to decide what to do with them.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So, what'll it be? Ask nicely, and I'll give them
back to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't shake the feeling that she's teasing me
again...
choice_data_list: I'm not going to beg for them.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Haha! Nice and obedient, aren't we? However...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Your phrasing needs improvement. Try this: "Give
them to me and I swear I'll do anything you ask."
choice_data_list: Um, I don't know about that...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Can you really afford to be wasting time here? It
says these documents are due today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She isn't wrong. I barely have any time until the
submission deadline. Desperate times call for
desperate measures...
choice_data_list:
Give them to me and I swear I'll do anything
you ask!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, there's a good trainer! I knew you had it
in you!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Here you go. They're all yours.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
You know, you're pretty good at begging when
you put your mind to it. Let's do this again, when
the fancy strikes.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Suit yourself. See ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli leaves with my documents in
hand—the documents due today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can still make it in time if I hurry and reprint
them. With that in mind, I head back to my office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I just manage to submit the documents on time.
Just as I'm breathing out a sigh of relief...

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hmm... So this is your training plan...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli shows up for the second time
today, still holding my documents from earlier.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
From the looks of it, your trainee shows a fair
amount of promise. I guess that explains your
confident attitude. But still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shuffle!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
I won't know if I never race her. Next time we see
each other, let's make it on the track. What do
you think, big shot?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli utters what sounds an awful lot like
a challenge and walks away.
